meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit to overcome the no-portfolio trap. A beginner-level checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code for fast monetization.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth; founders don't need a gallery of side projects, they need a revenue-generating MVP. By utilizing a high-velocity SaaS starter kit, you can bypass months of boilerplate development, deploy a production-ready application in hours, and demonstrate immediate commercial viability to your target market.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank GitHub profile, the silence of 'no portfolio' echoing louder than your ambition. The market doesn't care about your resume; it cares about the problem you solve. Every day spent hand-coding authentication or database schemas is a day your competitor is capturing market share.

The secret isn't more hours—it's leverage. By deploying a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you shift from being a 'coder' to an 'architect.' You stop building plumbing and start building value. This is how you transform from a founder with an idea into a founder with a product.

steps.title: Define Your Monetization Core
steps.description: Identify the one feature your users will pay for. Avoid feature creep; focus on a single, high-value transaction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lean SaaS architecture schema focused on a single paid API endpoint for a B2B productivity tool. Include database models for Stripe subscriptions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a project roadmap focusing on the core Stripe integration and user authentication flow.'

steps.title: Initialize the Foundation
steps.description: Use a production-grade starter kit to scaffold your environment, ensuring security and deployment best practices are baked in.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js starter kit with integrated Auth0, Tailwind CSS, and PostgreSQL support.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the project boilerplate with the recommended folder structure and environment configurations.'

steps.title: Build the User Feedback Loop
steps.description: Implement a minimal UI that captures user intent or email signups before the full product is even live.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive landing page component that includes an email capture form and a waitlist CTA.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate the landing page UI and connect it to a simple database table for waitlist storage.'

steps.title: Automate the Data Pipeline
steps.description: Connect your core logic to your database to ensure data persistence is handled correctly from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure server-side function to handle user data input and store it in the PostgreSQL database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the database schema and the API route to handle user data persistence safely.'

steps.title: Execute Deployment
steps.description: Push your code to a live environment to prove the product exists outside your local machine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment script for Vercel or Railway that includes environment variable validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Run the deployment checklist and verify all environment variables are correctly mapped for production.'

pro_tips: Never build an auth system from scratch; use a provider like Clerk or Supabase to save 40 hours of security overhead.
Prioritize 'Time to First Dollar' over 'Time to Perfect Code'; users will forgive a clunky UI if the value is undeniable.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your checkout flow; it is the most critical path in your entire application.
Focus your portfolio on 'Case Studies' of business problems solved, not just links to code repositories.
Automate your feedback collection; a product that talks to its users is worth ten times more than one that doesn't.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, share the link with 50 potential users in your target niche, gather feedback for 48 hours, and iterate on the most requested feature.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a founder. You have the tools, the blueprint, and the strategy to launch a revenue-generating machine today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
